metadata.name: test
metadata.description: A creeping corruption poisons the rivers and fields. Find the purification stones in the dungeons and cleanse the sacred fountain in Cedarcrest.

moongate.name: Moongate
moongate.description: A shimmering ring of blue light hovers above the ground. The air crackles with energy. Where it leads, none can say.

whispering_stones.name: Whispering Stones
whispering_stones.description: Three tall standing stones arranged in a triangle. When the wind blows through them, you can almost hear words.

towns.name: Cedarcrest
towns.description: A fortified settlement perched on a rocky bluff overlooking the valley.

key_dungeons.name: Iron Halls
key_dungeons.description: The entrance to Iron Halls gapes like a wound in the hillside. A cold draught carries the scent of damp stone.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Brave the depths of Iron Halls for the Jade Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Few who enter these halls return unchanged.
